reviews.review_title: Barely usable in its current state
reviews.review_description:
Connection to PC is unreliable and often fails without reason. When it does work, the experience is unstable with frequent lag and crashes that break gameplay.

The app does not provide a consistent VR streaming experience and needs major stability improvements.

Honestly, I don't quite get why this app has such low ratings. My guess is that some folks don't fully understand how the tech works and blame the app, when it really depends on your network quality and PC power.
For me, it's been great. At first, I was using an older router, and yeah, I had lag and the stream would drop sometimes, even though my PC is pretty powerful. But once I upgraded to a new router with Wi‑Fi 6 support, everything started running smoothly.
So no complaints here the app itself works flawlessly. Just make sure your setup can keep up.

reviews.review_title: Why the bad reviews??? This is Amazing!
reviews.review_description: I spent so much time with virtual desktop, trying to troubleshoot and find settings with decent latency/ compression. I have a wifi 6e band reserved only for wireless VR and my PC is connected to it. I couldn't find a good experience with VD but when I tried this it just WORKS first try. No.conoression I didn't change any settings. Visuals look amazing. Latency is great. I'm not sure why this clicks with my setup so well on first try but I deleted VD and now use this exclusively. Maybe this has to do with the steam frame coming soon and valve has perfected wireless VR? That's what it feels like to me.

So, when i first got Steam Link, it was buggy and wouldn't work. Then after trying different things for what felt like 5 hours, it finally worked and it was great! now if i play for more than 5 hours on any game it pops up the 405 error code for my PC not responding even when it is responding. It definitely needs worked on, but it can be okay sometimes. What can you expect from a free linking app.

Keeps saying hosts pc has stopped responding i cant even play its laggy and i cant play nothin i use gtag to test to see if i can play steam vr and even gorilla tag dont load worked about 3 times dont get its no worth it.
It was perfectly fine before, now one update comes along and bricks the entire app giving me the stupid error 19958 code and constantly disconnects my headset. 1 star until this is fixed.

Its so bad. Make it support a higher bitrate/bandwidth. I heard virtual desktop is far bettwr. Steam link is laggy and fuzzy i have the best wifi in our area yet some games are. Buggy and steam link view is buggy I dont know what to do is it limited idk this app can definitely be bettwr im seeing so many issue and 1 star reviews this needs fixing on PC and quest. Do bettwr please 🙏

Great app overall except for the fact that if my pc lags the smallest bit even if it’s unnoticeable, steam link decides to say “steam vr has had an issue” I press windows and it says “resolved” then my screen goes all pixelated and glitched out and I have to restart. Happens to me every time I use steam link.

reviews.review_title: Worst PC link in VR history
reviews.review_description:
Every time you try to launch steam link it automatically gives you the 19958 error every single time, and on top of that if you somehow get it working, the resolution and fps is some of the worst you will ever see. 

in conclusion, do NOT download it unless your PC is connected to Ethernet. And if not, the consequences of not having Ethernet will be catastrophic. Please do not even bother and or waste your time on this useless waste of storage. 

Please do not make the same mistake as me and read the positive reviews and actually believe it.

much love, malwair. <3

I attempted to use this on my Quest 3 to play Boneworks via my PC after swapping from Windows to Bazzite and all I can say is DO NOT BOTHER TRYING. I had only a flickering line towards the top of screen for video in my left eye with the rest of that screen blacked out, and my laptop is now frozen in Boneworks with a hard restart needed. I get the Steam Frame is around the corner Valve, but there is ZERO EXCUSE to leave those of us who are currently stuck with Meta's hardware to suffer as we wait.

The app does exactly what it is meant to do. It has great integration with the quest 3 as far as showing the quest 3 controllers as well as hand tracking. Plays 2D games great as well. Strongly recommend to use a hub such as the prism xr for the best wireless experience.

At first, I tried linking my Quest to my PC using Air Link over Wi-Fi. The setup process was lengthy, and the results were disappointing: frequent lag, long loading times, and noticeable dizziness.

Despite its 3-star rating, I decided to give Steam Link a try... and it worked flawlessly. All you need to do is enter the code shown on your PC's Steam client, and you're ready to go. No additional hassle.

Steam Link isn't limited to Steam games either. By switching to desktop view within the app, you can launch non-Steam titles as well. Thanks to this, I was able to play Vivecraft without any issues.

Overall, it's been a great solution so far: smooth, responsive, and problem-free.

reviews.review_title: Works! Used a VR Link cable
reviews.review_description:
So my husband plays his steam vr games with Oculus Rift S. Recently, we got new games and his controller is drifting. So I decided to try playing using my Quest 2. We read all the reviews. Here is what happened.

First, I ran the steam link app from quest 2. It ask for detect wireless. It finds the PC and gives a code to type in Pc. Hubby typed it. Then I ran over to get my controllers to proceed, somehow disconnected the connection and it says error disconnected. 

But since my quest 2 was low on battery, we had it plugged into the VR USB port and it all of a sudden ran hubby PC desktop in quest 2. So I played it! Tested it for games. Love it. 

Will test wifi link after our vacation of not 2.4Ghz

Some days it works perfectly, some days it works about the same as a busted toaster. It's either buttery smooth with minimal lag, stutters, FPS drops, graphic drops etc - or it's a laggy piece of garbage that freezes and stutters every few seconds. Sometimes it just refuses to connect to my PC even after restarting the app or my PC as a whole...

This is a great alternative if you don’t want to pay 20$ for virtual desktop. This app itself allows you to play any virtual steam game for free without any purchase, unless you pay for the game itself. Again I think this is a great alternative for virtual desktop and you could even mod your games the same way.
